A : Finset ℕ
N : ℕ
hAN : A ⊆ range N
hA : ThreeAPFree ↑A
⊢ ∃ c > 0, ↑A.card ≤ ↑N / exp (-c * log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹)

proof:
by
  have h₁ : (A.card : ℝ) ≤ N := by
    have h₂ : A.card ≤ (range N).card := Finset.card_le_card hAN
    have h₃ : (range N).card = N := by
      simp
    have h₄ : (A.card : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) := by
      norm_cast at h₂ ⊢
      <;> simp_all [h₃]
      <;> linarith
    exact h₄
  have h₂ : ∃ c > 0, (A.card : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) / exp (-c * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
    by_cases h : N = 0
    · -- If N = 0, the statement is trivial because A must be empty
      subst h
      have h₃ : A = ∅ := by
        have h₄ : A ⊆ (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by
          simp_all [Finset.range_zero]
          <;> aesop
        exact Finset.Subset.antisymm h₄ (by simp)
      simp_all [h₃]
      <;> norm_num
      <;>
      (try { use 1; norm_num }) <;>
      (try { use 1; norm_num; simp_all [exp_pos] }) <;>
      (try { use 1; norm_num; simp_all [exp_pos]; linarith })
    · -- If N ≠ 0, we can use a constant c = 1
      have h₃ : (N : ℝ) > 0 := by positivity
      have h₄ : Real.exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≤ 1 := by
        have h₅ : Real.exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≤ Real.exp 0 := by
          apply Real.exp_le_exp.2
          have h₆ : - (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ) ≤ 0 := by
            have h₇ : (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by positivity
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h₆ : Real.exp 0 = (1 : ℝ) := by norm_num
        linarith
      have h₅ : (A.card : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) / exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
        have h₆ : (A.card : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) := h₁
        have h₇ : (N : ℝ) / exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≥ (N : ℝ) := by
          have h₈ : exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≤ 1 := h₄
          have h₉ : (N : ℝ) > 0 := by positivity
          have h₁₀ : (N : ℝ) / exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≥ (N : ℝ) := by
            calc
              (N : ℝ) / exp (- (1 : ℝ) * (Real.log (N : ℝ)) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≥ (N : ℝ) / 1 := by gcongr <;> linarith
              _ = (N : ℝ) := by ring
          exact h₁₀
        linarith
      refine' ⟨1, by norm_num, _⟩
      exact h₅
  obtain ⟨c, hc_pos, hc⟩ := h₂
  refine' ⟨c, hc_pos, _⟩
  norm_cast at hc ⊢
  <;>
  (try { simp_all [Finset.card_range] }) <;>
  (try { linarith }) <;>
  (try { assumption }) <;>
  (try { exact_mod_cast hc }) <;>
  (try { simp_all [exp_pos] })
  <;>
  (try { linarith })
